candidate_edge_bar: OOS per_trade>0 AND positive_quarters>=4/6 AND top5_day_pct<200 AND n_trades>=20

baseline_live_config.note: This is the closest cell to the LIVE engine config (params.json v15.3).

honest_verdict: NO LIVE-AUTHORIZED EDGE. The only live-authorized setup (BEARISH_REJECTION) is per-trade NEGATIVE on real fills in ALL 20 strike/stop cells (best bear cell strike=2(OTM-2) stop=-0.08 = $0.3/trade, n~66). The 6 aggregate cells that 'clear the bar' do so ONLY because the DRAFT, NOT-live-authorized BULLISH_RECLAIM book (best $52.4/trade) masks the losing bear book — the C4/C24 sub-population anti-pattern, NOT a shippable live edge. Zero of those cells clear on the authorized bear side alone. The pattern that IS real and robust across all cells: the v15 default/wide premium stop bleeds; a TIGHT -8% premium stop is the only stop that is OOS-positive at every strike (the live ITM-2/-0.50 baseline is NEGATIVE: $-6.8/trade overall). Honest read: the live engine has no demonstrated 0DTE option edge on its authorized setup over 2025-01..2026-05 real fills; nothing here is ship-ready under OP-16.

DISCLOSURE.authority: real OPRA fills (C1) — the only WR authority; no BS fallback in this study
DISCLOSURE.per_trade: expectancy (per_trade $) reported alongside WR (OP-14: WR not standalone)
DISCLOSURE.concentration: top5_day_pct = top-5 winning DAYS as % of total P&L (OP-20 #5)
DISCLOSURE.is_oos: IS=2025 vs OOS=2026; ~12mo IS vs ~4.5mo OOS
DISCLOSURE.direction_split: bull(C) vs bear(P) reported per cell (the bull-tilt claim)
DISCLOSURE.no_survivor_cherry_pick: cells positive only on tiny-N / high-concentration / OOS-negative are reported with clears_bar=false (anti-pattern 2.10)
DISCLOSURE.sizing: qty=3 per-contract read; option bracket P&L is linear in qty so this isolates the per-trade edge (scale to account per-trade risk cap separately)
DISCLOSURE.opra_miss: simulate_trade_real returns None on OPRA cache miss for the swept strike; that signal is dropped for that cell (n_dropped_opra_miss reported per cell)
DISCLOSURE.detection_faithfulness: signals captured by wrapping simulate_trade_real and running the live orchestrator ONCE under params.json v15.3 config — zero signal drift vs production; only strike/stop/exit are overridden in re-sim
